/en/docs/build/harnesses.title: Harnesses
/en/docs/build/harnesses.description: The harness is the runtime that executes your agent loop. Swap one line of YAML to switch between Claude, Codex, and other runtimes.

/en/docs/build/models.title: Models & Credentials
/en/docs/build/models.description: Declare your model in agent YAML and let Goalrail manage the credentials that authenticate to each provider.

/en/docs/build/prompts.title: Prompts & Skills
/en/docs/build/prompts.description: Shape agent behavior with system prompts, and extend it with skills: reusable instruction sets the agent loads on demand.

/en/docs/build/tools.title: MCP & Tools
/en/docs/build/tools.description: Give your agent capabilities beyond conversation. Declare tools and MCP servers in your agent YAML, each with a name you choose.

/en/docs/collaborate/auth.title: Auth & SSO
/en/docs/collaborate/auth.description: Authenticate users in Goalrail three ways. Pick the approach that fits your setup, from simple tokens to full SSO.

/en/docs/collaborate.title: Pair Programming
/en/docs/collaborate.description: Goalrail is multi-user: share a live session by link, let a teammate co-drive, or fork a conversation across terminal, web, and mobile.

/en/docs/deploy/cloud-sandbox-host.title: Cloud Sandbox Host
/en/docs/deploy/cloud-sandbox-host.description: Move the Goalrail runner from your laptop to a remote container so your agent keeps working in an isolated cloud environment.

/en/docs/deploy/database.title: Database
/en/docs/deploy/database.description: The Goalrail server persists session history, accounts, and artifacts. Choose between Postgres and SQLite, with the same schema and migrations.

/en/docs/deploy/overview.title: Shared Server
/en/docs/deploy/overview.description: Deploy the Goalrail server so your agents are reachable from your phone, shareable with teammates, and running while your laptop sleeps.

/en/docs/interact/desktop.title: Desktop App
/en/docs/interact/desktop.description: The Goalrail desktop app brings the full web UI to a native window, with notifications, a dock badge, and multiple windows.

/en/docs/interact/mobile.title: Mobile
/en/docs/interact/mobile.description: Access the same Goalrail session on terminal, browser, and phone simultaneously. Start on your laptop, continue on your phone.

/en/docs/interact/terminal.title: Terminal
/en/docs/interact/terminal.description: Goalrail's keyboard-first default interface, with streaming output and real-time tool execution for people who live in the terminal.

/en/docs/interact/web-ui.title: Web UI
/en/docs/interact/web-ui.description: The Goalrail web UI starts automatically with every session; open the printed URL in any browser to work with your agent.

/en/docs/omnibox.title: Omnibox
/en/docs/omnibox.description: Omnibox is Goalrail's secure OS-level sandbox that wraps any agent to run it unattended without exposing your credentials, files, or network.

/en/docs/policies/builtin.title: Builtin Policies
/en/docs/policies/builtin.description: Built-in Goalrail policies for common safety and cost-control guardrails. Apply them by name or reference them in YAML.

/en/docs/policies/custom.title: Custom Policies
/en/docs/policies/custom.description: When built-in policies aren't enough, write your own in Python, register them on the server, and use them like builtins.

/en/docs/policies/os-sandbox.title: Omnibox (OS Sandbox)
/en/docs/policies/os-sandbox.description: Omnibox is Goalrail's secure OS sandbox: restrict filesystem and network access and hide credentials for unattended, locked-down agents.

/en/docs/policies/overview.title: Contextual Policies
/en/docs/policies/overview.description: Policies control what your Goalrail can do, intercepting every action to allow, ask for approval, or deny it in real time.

/en/docs/use/builtin-agents/debby.title: Debby
/en/docs/use/builtin-agents/debby.description: Debby asks two models the same question and runs a multi-round debate where each critiques and refines the other's answer.

/en/docs/use/builtin-agents.title: Built-in Multi-AI Agents
/en/docs/use/builtin-agents.description: Goalrail ships with multi-agent orchestrators that combine different AI agents into a single workflow, ready to run out of the box.

/en/docs/use/builtin-agents/polly.title: Polly
/en/docs/use/builtin-agents/polly.description: Polly is a supervisor that delegates sub-tasks to sub-agents on separate harnesses and worktrees, with cross-agent review and human-decided merges.

/en/docs/use/coding-agents.title: Coding Agents
/en/docs/use/coding-agents.description: Run Claude Code or Codex through Goalrail with one command and get a web UI, persistent sessions, collaboration, mobile, and policies.

/en/docs/use/custom-agents.title: Custom Agents
/en/docs/use/custom-agents.description: Define a custom agent in a short YAML file, with no code or frameworks, and get the full Goalrail platform around it.

/en/faq.title: FAQ
/en/faq.description: Answers to common questions about Goalrail: what it is, how it works, and how to get started.

/en/quickstart/coding-agent.title: Tutorial: Coding Agent
/en/quickstart/coding-agent.description: Tutorial: see what Goalrail adds on top of Claude Code or Codex, including a web UI, mobile access, session sharing, and mid-conversation agent switching.

/en/quickstart/collaborate.title: Tutorial: Collaborate from Anywhere
/en/quickstart/collaborate.description: Tutorial: deploy a server to access agents from your phone, share live sessions with teammates, and run agents on cloud sandbox hosts.

/en/quickstart/install.title: Install
/en/quickstart/install.description: Install the Goalrail CLI with a single command — via the installer script, uv, pip, or Homebrew — and grab the macOS desktop app.

/en/quickstart/policies.title: Tutorial: Contextual Policies
/en/quickstart/policies.description: Tutorial: attach context-aware policies to a live session to warn on spend, pause for approval, or block risky actions, with no code required.

/en/quickstart/polly.title: Tutorial: Polly (Multi-AI Coding)
/en/quickstart/polly.description: Tutorial: see Polly in practice, a multi-agent coding orchestrator that delegates sub-tasks across AI agents with built-in cross-vendor review.

/ru/docs/build/harnesses.title: Harnesses
/ru/docs/build/harnesses.description: Harness определяет runtime, который исполняет agent loop внутри Goalrail.

/ru/docs/build/models.title: Модели и доступы
/ru/docs/build/models.description: Опишите model в YAML, а Goalrail поможет настроить credentials: API keys, subscriptions или gateways.

/ru/docs/build/prompts.title: Промпты и skills
/ru/docs/build/prompts.description: Настройте поведение агента через system prompt и reusable skills.

/ru/docs/build/tools.title: MCP и tools
/ru/docs/build/tools.description: Добавьте агенту MCP servers, Python functions, sub-agents и inherited tools.

/ru/docs/collaborate/auth.title: Auth и SSO
/ru/docs/collaborate/auth.description: Настройте auth для Goalrail server: встроенные accounts, OIDC SSO или trusted proxy headers.

/ru/docs/collaborate.title: Совместная работа
/ru/docs/collaborate.description: Делитесь live sessions, co-drive агентами и делайте forks между terminal, web UI и mobile.

/ru/docs/deploy/cloud-sandbox-host.title: Cloud sandbox host
/ru/docs/deploy/cloud-sandbox-host.description: Перенесите Goalrail runner с laptop в isolated remote container.

/ru/docs/deploy/database.title: База данных
/ru/docs/deploy/database.description: Goalrail server хранит history, accounts и artifacts в Postgres или SQLite.

/ru/docs/deploy/overview.title: Общий сервер
/ru/docs/deploy/overview.description: Разверните Goalrail server, чтобы sessions были доступны с телефона, для команды и через cloud sandbox hosts.

/ru/docs/interact/desktop.title: Desktop app
/ru/docs/interact/desktop.description: Установите Goalrail desktop app и подключите его к локальному или удаленному server.

/ru/docs/interact/mobile.title: Мобильный доступ
/ru/docs/interact/mobile.description: Открывайте Goalrail sessions с телефона, отвечайте на approvals и проверяйте прогресс.

/ru/docs/interact/terminal.title: Терминал
/ru/docs/interact/terminal.description: Запускайте и управляйте Goalrail sessions из командной строки.

/ru/docs/interact/web-ui.title: Веб-интерфейс
/ru/docs/interact/web-ui.description: Web UI Goalrail показывает live session, files, agents, shells, todos, comments и multimodal input.

/ru/docs/omnibox.title: Omnibox
/ru/docs/omnibox.description: Omnibox - OS-level sandbox Goalrail для filesystem, network, environment и credentials boundaries.

/ru/docs/policies/builtin.title: Встроенные политики
/ru/docs/policies/builtin.description: Каталог встроенных policies Goalrail для safety, approvals и cost control.

/ru/docs/policies/custom.title: Свои политики
/ru/docs/policies/custom.description: Пишите custom policies на Python и подключайте их к Goalrail server.

/ru/docs/policies/os-sandbox.title: OS sandbox config
/ru/docs/policies/os-sandbox.description: Настройте Omnibox: filesystem, network, environment и credential boundaries для Goalrail agents.

/ru/docs/policies/overview.title: Контекстные политики
/ru/docs/policies/overview.description: Policies управляют тем, что Goalrail agent может делать: allow, ask или deny в реальном времени.

/ru/docs/use/builtin-agents/debby.title: Debby
/ru/docs/use/builtin-agents/debby.description: Debby - встроенный model debate workflow Goalrail для критики, сравнения и synthesis.

/ru/docs/use/builtin-agents.title: Встроенные многоагентные workflows
/ru/docs/use/builtin-agents.description: Goalrail поставляется с готовыми workflows, которые комбинируют несколько AI-агентов в одной управляемой сессии.

/ru/docs/use/builtin-agents/polly.title: Polly
/ru/docs/use/builtin-agents/polly.description: Polly - встроенный coding orchestrator Goalrail для fanout, parallel work и cross-review.

/ru/docs/use/coding-agents.title: Coding agents
/ru/docs/use/coding-agents.description: Запускайте Claude Code или Codex через Goalrail и получайте web UI, persistent sessions, collaboration, mobile access и policies.

/ru/docs/use/custom-agents.title: Свои агенты
/ru/docs/use/custom-agents.description: Опишите своего агента в YAML и получите вокруг него Goalrail UI, policies, collaboration, tools и deployment.

/ru/faq.title: FAQ
/ru/faq.description: Ответы на частые вопросы о Goalrail: что это такое, как работает и с чего начать.

/ru/quickstart/coding-agent.title: Туториал: coding agent
/ru/quickstart/coding-agent.description: Посмотрите, что Goalrail добавляет поверх Claude Code или Codex: web UI, mobile access, shared sessions, forks и policies.

/ru/quickstart/collaborate.title: Туториал: совместная работа
/ru/quickstart/collaborate.description: Разверните общий сервер Goalrail, подключите laptop и phone, делитесь live sessions и запускайте cloud sandbox hosts.

/ru/quickstart/install.title: Установка
/ru/quickstart/install.description: Установите Goalrail CLI одной командой через installer script, uv, pip или Homebrew и скачайте приложение для macOS.

/ru/quickstart/policies.title: Туториал: контекстные политики
/ru/quickstart/policies.description: Добавьте context-aware policies к live session: предупреждения по расходам, approval prompts и блокировки рискованных действий.

/ru/quickstart/polly.title: Туториал: многоагентная coding orchestration
/ru/quickstart/polly.description: Посмотрите Polly в работе: агент разбивает coding task на подзадачи, распределяет их между AI-агентами и собирает review.
